/** * Módulo 1 - Admin Dashboard * Dashboard com menu para todas as ações administrativas */ import { useState } from 'react' import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom' import { signOut } from 'firebase/auth' import { auth } from '../../services/firebase' import { Button } from '../../components/ui/button' import { Tabs, TabsContent, TabsList, TabsTrigger } from '../../components/ui/tabs' import UploadVoters from './UploadVoters' import UploadProxy from './UploadProxy' import ElectionsList from './ElectionsList' import ProxiesList from './ProxiesList' export default function AdminDashboard() { const navigate = useNavigate() const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState('upload-voters') const handleLogout = async () => { await signOut(auth) navigate('/Admin') } return (
{/* Header */}

Painel Administrativo

Sistema de Gerenciamento de Votações

{/* Main Content */}
Upload Votantes Upload Procuração Listar Votações Listar Procurações setActiveTab('list-elections')} /> setActiveTab('list-proxies')} />
